title: AN ACT CONVERTING SITIO CANTUBI IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BALANGKAYAN IN THE PROVINCE OF EASTERN SAMAR INTO A REGULAR BARRIO TO BE KNOWN AS BARRIO CANTUBI.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1476 / 67 OG No. 38, 7449 (September 20, 1971)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6214, June 19, 1971 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING SITIO CANTUBI IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BALANGKAYAN IN THE PROVINCE OF EASTERN SAMAR INTO A REGULAR BARRIO TO BE KNOWN AS BARRIO CANTUBI.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Cantubi in the Municipality of Balangkayan in the Province of Eastern Samar is hereby converted into a regular barrio to be known as Barrio Cantubi.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1971.
